title: Amyema spraguei
intro:
There is not enough information available about Amyema spraguei, to write a paragraph about it.

However, Amyema is a genus of flowering plants in the family Loranthaceae, commonly known as mistletoes. Amyema species are hemiparasitic plants that obtain their nutrients by connecting to the vascular tissue of host plants. 

Some other species of Amyema, such as Amyema mauritianum, have been studied for their potential health benefits and bioactive constituents.
